This repository contains a PowerShell module used by a lot of customers, running in auto update mode. This means that changes to this module can have a big impact and it is important to ensure that any changes are well-tested and do not introduce any breaking changes.

All PowerShell code in this repository should be compatible with PowerShell 7.4 or later, and should follow best practices for PowerShell development, including using proper naming conventions, commenting code, and writing unit tests where possible.

All commits to this repository should be made with conventional commit messages, in order for release please to work properly.

The module is published to powershellgallery.com, under the Fortytwo brand.
